# Prove-on-Metal — WS-A + WS-C run-cost tee-up

Itemized, brokered to the **cheapest compliant supply** in the canonical `gpu-catalog.v1.json` (spot where noted).
These are *one-off run costs* (bill only while the job runs), not the monthly opex in `scripts/cost-report.mjs`.

# WS-A · Fine-tuning (KubeRay + TritFabric LoRA trainer)

| Run | GPU×N | Hours | Mode | Cheapest provider | $/hr (eff) | Total | Broker saving |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| WS-A · LoRA fine-tune Qwen3-32B (1×H100, 12h, spot) | H100×1 | 12 | spot | nebius | $1.5 | **$18** | 40% |
| WS-A · LoRA fine-tune Llama-3.3-70B (2×H100, 18h) | H100×2 | 18 | on-demand | nebius | $4 | **$72** | 20% |
| WS-A · Ray Serve choir baseline (1×L4, 730h/mo) | L4×1 | 730 | on-demand | nebius | $0.55 | **$401.5** | 35% |

**Total: $491.50** (brokered to cheapest compliant supply; spot where noted).


# WS-C · Cloud-mesh proof (beats-frontier-on-your-tests, flat cost)

| Run | GPU×N | Hours | Mode | Cheapest provider | $/hr (eff) | Total | Broker saving |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| WS-C · beats-frontier proof burst (1×H100, 6h, spot) | H100×1 | 6 | spot | nebius | $1.5 | **$9** | 40% |
| WS-C · live client demo cluster (4×H100, 3h) | H100×4 | 3 | on-demand | nebius | $8 | **$24** | 20% |

**Total: $33.00** (brokered to cheapest compliant supply; spot where noted).

## Phase-1 envelope
- **One-off (WS-A fine-tunes + WS-C bursts, excl. the 730h/mo Ray Serve baseline): $123.00**
- **WS-A Ray Serve choir baseline (24/7, 1×L4): $401.50/mo** (the only recurring line)
